title: Ladders Revision
description: Give a new look to Ladders
body:
From the Jappa Texture update, Mojang still didn't changed the ladders' texture, with this pack you will be able to have a fresh 3d models for ladders using vanilla textures (so if you use something like faithful this pack should adapt to it)

![In-Game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZqlcQbeC/images/1fbbce696085316f1499f7be461be9bc1b8a0ad2.png)

![Hotbar and on Hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZqlcQbeC/images/80fc301f9174ab05936456a2c7144e18b591bfd9.png)
